caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone, speaking and smiling. The background features a room filled with framed pictures on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, and clothing racks. In the bottom corners of the screen, logos are visible: one on the left featuring a red and white graphic and another on the right that reads "DOPELLY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions from a thoughtful look to a wide smile while continuing to speak into the microphone. His head tilts slightly, and his mouth moves as he talks, while the background and equipment remain static.
